mapper.select: SELECT * FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_member (family_id, user_id, role, relation, joined_at, status) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{relation}, #{joinedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM family_member WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM family_member WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM family_member WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND role = 'PARENT' AND status = 1
